name: NZXT H6 Flow RGB Compact Dual-Chamber Mid-Tower Airflow Computer Case - Matte White - Panoramic Glass Panels - 3x F120 RGB Core 120mm Fans - Headset Audio Jack - 2x USB 3.2 Gen1 Type-A - USB 3.2 Gen2 Type-C (CC-H61FW-R1)

description: Compact dual-chamber mid-tower case with RGB fans and panoramic glass for high-end systems.
